columns.name: PRINT
columns.description: Print flag indicating if the document should be printed

columns.name: EDI
columns.description: EDI flag indicating Electronic Data Interchange usage for this order

columns.name: EPOST
columns.description: Email flag indicating if email notifications should be sent for this order

columns.name: EFAKTURA
columns.description: eFaktura flag indicating if e-invoicing is enabled for this order

columns.name: AVTALEGIRO
columns.description: Agreed payment flag, possibly related to a specific payment agreement or method

columns.name: AUTOGIRO
columns.description: Automatic payment flag indicating if automatic payments are enabled for this order

columns.name: LOKAL_UTSKRIFT
columns.description: Local printing flag, indicating if the document should be printed locally or remotely

columns.name: FAKTUDATO_SENTRAL
columns.description: Central invoice date, likely related to when the central system processed the order or issued an invoice

columns.name: ORDRTYPE
columns.description: Type of order, distinguishing between different types of orders (e.g., sales, purchase)
